title: Subscription care price concern
content: LG Styler subscription care is convenient, but the renewal price feels too expensive compared with Samsung care plans. I might switch if there is no discount.

title: Washer installation delay
content: The washer itself is good, but installation was delayed twice and the delivery team did not explain the schedule clearly. Very frustrating.

title: Energy saving mode is useful
content: The new washer energy saving mode helped reduce electricity usage. I am considering subscription care if it includes regular maintenance.

title: Refrigerator noise issue
content: The refrigerator cooling is strong, but the compressor noise is louder than expected. Need service check before recommending it.

title: LG vs Samsung washer
content: I am comparing LG washer with Samsung. LG has better reviews for quiet operation, but I want to know if ThinQ app connectivity is reliable.

title: ThinQ app keeps disconnecting
content: My LG air conditioner disconnects from the ThinQ app every few days. The hardware is fine, but the app connection problem is annoying.

title: Air purifier for kids
content: With bad fine dust this week, I am looking to buy an LG air purifier for a room with kids. Filter subscription sounds useful if the price is reasonable.

title: Maintenance support complaint
content: Maintenance response took too long. I called support three times for the refrigerator and still did not get a clear repair date.

title: 신혼가전 구독 고민
content: 이사 준비하면서 냉장고와 세탁기를 한 번에 살지 구독형 가전 케어로 시작할지 고민 중입니다. 초기 비용 할인 있으면 바로 상담받고 싶어요.

title: 에어컨 냄새와 제습
content: 요즘 습도가 높아서 에어컨 냄새와 곰팡이가 걱정됩니다. 제습 기능과 필터 관리 서비스가 포함된 케어 상품을 알아보고 있어요.

title: 공기청정기 필터 구독
content: 미세먼지가 심한 날이 많아져서 공기청정기 필터 교체 주기를 놓치지 않는 구독 서비스가 필요하다고 느꼈습니다.

title: LG Styler 만족 후기
content: LG Styler를 쓰고 나서 외투 냄새 관리가 편해졌습니다. 구독 케어까지 묶으면 부모님 댁에도 추천할 생각입니다.

title: Air conditioner review comment
content: Cooling is fast, but installation cost was higher than expected. Please compare total cost with Carrier before buying.

title: ThinQ app setup
content: The ThinQ app setup failed twice during smart diagnosis. I expected a premium experience, so this was disappointing.

title: Refrigerator energy review
content: The refrigerator energy efficiency looks excellent. I want to buy it before summer if there is a bundle discount.

title: Care plan question
content: Does subscription care include regular cleaning and filter replacement? If yes, I want a quote for air purifier and air conditioner together.

title: App complaint
content: ThinQ app disconnected again. Love the LG AC but this app issue needs urgent fixing.

title: Dust alert
content: Fine dust is terrible today. Thinking about buying an LG air purifier before the weekend.

title: Subscription price
content: Subscription care sounds nice but the monthly price feels high. Need a family bundle discount.

title: Styler purchase intent
content: Trying LG Styler at the store convinced me. I want to buy one if delivery and setup are available next week.
